Provides fixture projects and ground-truth datasets for benchmarking the
rrlmgraph package. Fixtures range from a minimal data-science script
project to a medium-sized Shiny application and a small R package,
covering the full spectrum of project types supported by rrlmgraph.

# Package index

## Benchmark Runner

Functions for executing the full benchmark suite against fixture
projects and ground-truth datasets.

- [`run_full_benchmark()`](https://davidrsch.github.io/rrlmgraph-bench/reference/run_full_benchmark.md)
  : Run the full rrlmgraph benchmark
- [`compute_benchmark_statistics()`](https://davidrsch.github.io/rrlmgraph-bench/reference/compute_benchmark_statistics.md)
  : Compute benchmark statistics from a full results data frame
- [`count_hallucinations()`](https://davidrsch.github.io/rrlmgraph-bench/reference/count_hallucinations.md)
  : Count hallucinations produced by an LLM in a generated code snippet
- [`rrlmgraphbench`](https://davidrsch.github.io/rrlmgraph-bench/reference/rrlmgraphbench-package.md)
  [`rrlmgraphbench-package`](https://davidrsch.github.io/rrlmgraph-bench/reference/rrlmgraphbench-package.md)
  : rrlmgraphbench: Benchmark Suite for rrlmgraph
